title: Livermore Institute for Fusion Technology
description: The Livermore Institute for Fusion Technology (LIFT) fosters public-private partnerships to accelerate the development of fusion power plants through advancements in inertial confinement fusion and high-energy density science, aiming to bridge critical scientific and technological gaps for commercialization. The institute envisions laser fusion power plants as a sustainable, clean energy solution capable of meeting significant electricity demands.
text:
"We are at a unique moment in time when science and technology advances have made the possibility of commercial fusion energy very real. LIFT is being created to enable the growing fusion energy industry to leverage our unique expertise and capabilities in inertial confinement fusion and high-energy density science to catalyze innovation and accelerate their path to commercialization. This is a place where our critical national security missions and the goal of energy dominance are truly aligned."
— Kim Budil, Director, Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
